evaluators.name: Morning Family Farm Tour with Picnic Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a weekend morning family-friendly tour for 2 adults and 2 children with a picnic-style food addon around $15 in the current cart.

evaluators.name: Three Medium Llama Wool Socks Under $25 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user searched within the socks category using a medium-size filter and added 3 different qualifying medium llama wool socks under $25 each to the current cart.

evaluators.name: Children Birthday Party Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a birthday party inquiry for about 10 children on a Saturday in June with an indoor-friendly option and cupcake upgrade, including contact details.

evaluators.name: 2-Day Weekend Itinerary Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if there is a 2-day itinerary where day 1 morning has a farm tour and a llama walk, day 2 morning has a fiber workshop, each for 2 participants, all starting before 1:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Digital Llama Gift Card Purchase Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if a digital llama-themed gift card of $50–$100 with email delivery at least a week after the baseline date was configured and added to the current cart.

evaluators.name: Beginner Fiber Workshop with Promo Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered one attendee for a beginner fiber workshop under $50 using the LLAMA10 promo code on the earliest available session and added it to the current cart.

evaluators.name: 2-Night Pasture-View Cabin with Breakfast Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a 2-night stay for 2 adults in a pasture-view cabin using a breakfast-included rate plan on two consecutive nights within the same month for at most $300 in the current cart.

evaluators.name: School Field Trip Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a school field trip inquiry for 25 students on an October weekday with animal-care focus, bus parking, and a 2-hour morning visit, including school contact details.
